path.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1));

polyline.style: fill: none; transform: rotate(calc((360 / 60 * var(--handle)) * 1deg)); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1));
